LanguageData.Plant_Wheat.label: wheat plant
LanguageData.Plant_Wheat.description: A staple grain crop cultivated by Dracaena settlers. It needs fertile soil and time, but supports a full milling and baking chain.
LanguageData.WheatEar.label: wheat ear
LanguageData.WheatEar.description: Harvested wheat ears. Basic grain material for porridge and flour.
LanguageData.Flour.label: wheat flour
LanguageData.Flour.description: Ground wheat flour. Better digestibility than raw grain and the core input for dough and yeast.
LanguageData.Yeast.label: yeast culture
LanguageData.Yeast.description: Active yeast cultivated from flour. Used to ferment dough for softer bread.
LanguageData.UnfermentedDough.label: unfermented dough
LanguageData.UnfermentedDough.description: Simple dough mixed from flour. It can be baked into hard travel bread.
LanguageData.FermentedDough.label: fermented dough
LanguageData.FermentedDough.description: Dough proofed with yeast. Requires more preparation, but yields much better bread.
LanguageData.Puls.label: wheat porridge
LanguageData.Puls.description: A thin porridge boiled from cracked wheat. Cheap and filling, but not pleasant.
LanguageData.MilitarisBread.label: military bread
LanguageData.MilitarisBread.description: Dense, dry field bread made from unfermented dough. Long-lasting and practical.
LanguageData.LeavenedBread.label: white bread
LanguageData.LeavenedBread.description: Soft white bread baked from fermented dough. Time-intensive to produce, but exceptionally nourishing and satisfying.
LanguageData.Drac_bench_smithy.label: draconic smithy
LanguageData.Drac_bench_smithy.description: A rugged smithy used by Dracaena colonists for heavy metalwork.
LanguageData.Drac_bench_stove.label: draconic cookstove
LanguageData.Drac_bench_stove.description: A broad cookstove used for kneading and baking grain-based food.
LanguageData.Drac_bench_tailor.label: draconic tailoring bench
LanguageData.Drac_bench_tailor.description: A tailoring bench adapted for Dracaena apparel and handcraft work.
LanguageData.Drac_bench_herb.label: draconic agronomy bench
LanguageData.Drac_bench_herb.description: A processing bench for herbal materials and grain preparation.
LanguageData.FermentationBucket.label: fermentation bucket
LanguageData.FermentationBucket.description: A sealed bucket setup used to culture wheat yeast from flour.
LanguageData.Oven.label: bread oven
LanguageData.Oven.description: A dedicated oven that keeps steady heat for high-quality leavened bread.
